tempting_prose_or_chart: Qwen 3.5, Qwen 3.6, or DeepSeek V4-era systems happened before the cutoff.
evidence_needed: Cutoff-bounded primary release posts, papers, repos, model cards, or archived official pages with dates and exact names.
fastest_route: Keep as support-pending gap lane; acquire primary source pack before prose claims; delete happened-release wording if not found.

tempting_prose_or_chart: ChatGPT was the fastest-growing app, had OpenAI-confirmed 100M users, drove quantified public reaction, paid users, revenue, named customers, or productivity.
evidence_needed: Metric-specific source chain separating Altman one-million-users post, Reuters/UBS/Similarweb estimates, primary product posts, and institutional response rows.
fastest_route: Support only local attributed metrics already row-normalized; otherwise quarantine broad reception and growth superlatives.

tempting_prose_or_chart: Claude 4 is the best coding model or exact SWE-bench/Terminal-bench numbers prove general coding-agent superiority.
evidence_needed: Exact Anthropic launch wording, benchmark version, scaffold, date, sample/task setup, comparison set, and independent benchmark source context.
fastest_route: Use benchmark-caveat matrix and product-doc screenshot only; build normalized benchmark rows before any exact chart.

tempting_prose_or_chart: NVIDIA GTC performance, cost, throughput, revenue, benchmark, or deployment claims are neutral historical facts.
evidence_needed: Independent corroboration per quantitative claim or explicit NVIDIA-attributed language with shipped/announced/roadmap label.
fastest_route: Keep GTC claims attributed; use slides as stagecraft/source surfaces; move neutral quantitative claims to blocked captions unless corroborated.

tempting_prose_or_chart: GPT-3 API ecosystem counts or Copilot adoption/productivity numbers prove platform success or developer productivity.
evidence_needed: Official snapshots plus same-scope secondary triangulation; metric definitions for users, apps, repositories, productivity, and time saved.
fastest_route: Keep direction-only prose; build source snapshot and metric table before numbers; delete productivity framing if evidence remains vendor-only.

tempting_prose_or_chart: Long system-card passages, red-team examples, exact policy wording, or labeler-process details are quote-ready.
evidence_needed: Local snapshots, page/section anchors, quote-safe extraction rows, word-limit notes, and context notes for each quoted passage.
fastest_route: Use existing short S-0074 quote-safe rows; create system-card extraction table before longer quotes; paraphrase until extracted.

tempting_prose_or_chart: A price-quality frontier or best-value model chart can be plotted from mixed provider pricing and leaderboard rows.
evidence_needed: Same-date, same-scope provider price rows; model/version alignment; input/output/cache/batch/reasoning/fine-tuning exclusions; rank snapshot contracts.
fastest_route: Keep exclusion map; expand normalized price rows and join audit before any frontier chart; delete mixed-scope points.

tempting_prose_or_chart: GTC slide-derived ratios, partner lists, availability timing, roadmap items, and deployment language are independent facts.
evidence_needed: Per-slide extraction rows with claim type, exact wording, page number, independent corroboration, and shipped/announced/roadmap label.
fastest_route: Use slides only as attributed NVIDIA visuals; mine GTC chart candidates separately; keep future roadmap items visibly future/announced.

tempting_prose_or_chart: Anthropic/Claude and Europe/xAI/rest-of-frontier can both occupy Chapter 12 without consequence.
evidence_needed: Final 24-chapter structure decision preserving mandatory Anthropic, Claude, Mistral, xAI, and rest-frontier coverage.
fastest_route: Run structure pass before Chapter 12 prose integration; retitle, split, or relocate material explicitly.

tempting_prose_or_chart: Azure/OpenAI/Copilot/product surfaces prove revenue, ROI, margin, workload volume, enterprise adoption, or productivity.
evidence_needed: Public filings, earnings lines, product telemetry, customer case studies, and same-scope metric definitions.
fastest_route: Keep mechanism/business-route prose; use enterprise blocker maps; support only access routes and announced products until financial rows exist.

tempting_prose_or_chart: Gemini/Gemini 1.5/Gemini 2.5 thinking proves Google caught up, leads, or converted research into market success.
evidence_needed: Benchmark contracts, adoption/revenue/search-distribution evidence, TPU cost/performance rows, and product usage metrics.
fastest_route: Use conversion-pressure frame; keep benchmark/adoption/revenue/TPU-performance claims blocked.

tempting_prose_or_chart: Open weights mean open source, safer, cheaper, more popular, easier, or more widely adopted.
evidence_needed: License texts, data transparency evidence, deployment/adoption evidence, cost studies, safety evals, and ecosystem metrics.
fastest_route: Use control-stack/adopter-burden figures; delete halo language unless separately supported.

tempting_prose_or_chart: Chinese/open frontier labs can be summarized by logos, national category, or implied leaderboard position.
evidence_needed: Primary source rows per lab/family plus benchmark/date contracts for any comparison.
fastest_route: Use supported-vs-gap source board; keep unsupported MiniMax/Baidu/Tencent/Xiaomi/StepFun lanes as acquisition targets only.

tempting_prose_or_chart: Claude computer use, MCP, and Claude Code docs prove autonomy, secure-by-default agents, MCP dominance, solved safety, productivity, or adoption.
evidence_needed: Outcome studies, security evaluations, adoption data, productivity measurements, MCP ecosystem evidence, and deployment evidence.
fastest_route: Use source surfaces as documentation/provenance only; keep bridge-vs-loop boundary and screenshot blockers visible.

tempting_prose_or_chart: GPU specs, CUDA stack diagrams, AI-factory slides, datacenter reports, or physical photos prove exact TCO, energy-per-token, supply, fuel mix, PUE, deployment scale, or market power.
evidence_needed: Exact engineering rows, independent site data, operator filings, energy calculations, supply-chain evidence, and rights-cleared photo provenance.
fastest_route: Keep stack bottlenecks and physical constraints; use negative controls before any photo/chart becomes evidence.

tempting_prose_or_chart: Closed-model corpus composition, exact data shares, legality, exhaustion, contamination rates, or synthetic-data sufficiency are known.
evidence_needed: Model-specific corpus disclosures, dataset papers, legal-source rows where relevant, contamination studies, and exact definitions.
fastest_route: Tell data as supply-chain and uncertainty story; quarantine closed-corpus/legal/exact-share claims.

tempting_prose_or_chart: Tools, RAG, code models, SWE-bench, LiveCodeBench, and terminal agents prove autonomous work, software quality, security, productivity, or job replacement.
evidence_needed: Benchmark contracts plus field studies, security review evidence, task definitions, human-review conditions, and productivity methodology.
fastest_route: Frame as supervised workflows and evaluation harnesses; do not infer workplace outcomes.

tempting_prose_or_chart: Reasoning models prove solved reasoning, hidden chain access, exact test-time compute costs, or permanent live ranks.
evidence_needed: Model/date/task/tool/sample/retry/budget/contamination contracts, cost/latency rows, and benchmark snapshots.
fastest_route: Attach inference contracts; quarantine live-rank, hidden-chain, exact-cost, and solved-reasoning claims.

tempting_prose_or_chart: Hallucination, sycophancy, prompt injection, jailbreak, and provenance examples prove prevalence or solved mitigation.
evidence_needed: Incident rows with scope, prevalence studies, eval methodology, mitigation tests, product/version/date context.
fastest_route: Keep failure families separate; use incidents as scoped examples only.

tempting_prose_or_chart: The final chapter can conclude AGI, consciousness, inevitable winners, labor replacement, solved trust, or post-cutoff outcomes.
evidence_needed: Cutoff-bounded evidence and explicit unresolved-by-cutoff sections; no post-cutoff history.
fastest_route: Use Chapter 24 as synthesis of mechanisms and unresolved gates, not forecast or victory lap.
